title: Qualcomm India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Qualcomm India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Qualcomm India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Qualcomm India:
Qualcomm India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Qualcomm India!
